PowerShell($b='{"action":"get_glp_payments","company":"กรุ๊ปลีส","date_from":"2026-01-01","date_to":"2026-07-04"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://n8n-new-project-gwf2.onrender.com/webhook/grouplease-api" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($b\)\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $flat = @\(\); foreach \($p in $data\) { foreach \($it in $p.items\) { $d = [double]$it.paid_amount - [double]$it.received_amount; if \([Math]::Abs\($d\) -ge 0.01\) { $flat += [PSCustomObject]@{ payment_no=$p.payment_no; contract=$it.contract_no; recv=$it.received_amount; paid=$it.paid_amount; diff=$d } } } }; "payments: $\($data.Count\), diff items: $\($flat.Count\)"; $flat | Select-Object -First 5 | Format-Table | Out-String } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($b='{"action":"get_glp_payments","company":"ธนบรรณ","date_from":"2026-01-01","date_to":"2026-07-04"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://n8n-new-project-gwf2.onrender.com/webhook/grouplease-api" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body \([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($b\)\) -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $flat = @\(\); foreach \($p in $data\) { foreach \($it in $p.items\) { $d = [double]$it.paid_amount - [double]$it.received_amount; if \([Math]::Abs\($d\) -ge 0.01\) { $flat += [PSCustomObject]@{ payment_no=$p.payment_no; contract=$it.contract_no; recv=$it.received_amount; paid=$it.paid_amount; diff=$d } } } }; "payments: $\($data.Count\), diff items: $\($flat.Count\)"; $flat | Select-Object -First 8 | Format-Table | Out-String } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(node -e "const post=async\(b\)=>{const r=await fetch\('https://n8n-new-project-gwf2.onrender.com/webhook/list-daily-receipts',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify\(b\)}\);const t=await r.text\(\);return t.trim\(\)?JSON.parse\(t\):[]};\(async\(\)=>{for\(const[f,t]of[['2026-03-01','2026-03-31'],['2026-02-01','2026-02-28'],['2026-01-01','2026-01-31']]\){const rows=await post\({date_from:f,date_to:t}\);const d=rows.map\(r=>String\(r.receipt_date\).slice\(0,10\)\).sort\(\);console.log\(f.slice\(0,7\)+': '+rows.length+' �'+\(rows.length?' | '+d[0]+' -> '+d[d.length-1]+\(rows.length>=1000?' \(LIMIT\)':''\):''\)\)}}\)\(\)")

PowerShell(node -e "const post=async\(b\)=>{const r=await fetch\('https://n8n-new-project-gwf2.onrender.com/webhook/list-daily-receipts',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify\(b\)}\);const t=await r.text\(\);return t.trim\(\)?JSON.parse\(t\):[]};\(async\(\)=>{const ranges=[['2026-03-01','2026-03-31'],['2026-04-01','2026-04-30'],['2026-05-01','2026-05-31'],['2026-06-01','2026-06-30'],['2026-07-01','2026-07-31']];for\(const[f,t]of ranges\){const rows=await post\({date_from:f,date_to:t}\);const hit=rows.filter\(r=>String\(r.customer_name||''\).includes\('�ѹ����'\)||String\(r.sale_invoice_no||''\).includes\('SS260400292'\)\);for\(const h of hit\){console.log\(h.receipt_no+' | '+String\(h.receipt_date\).slice\(0,10\)+' | '+h.customer_name+' | sale:'+\(h.sale_invoice_no||'-'\)+' | type:'+\(h.receipt_type||'-'\)+' | total:'+h.total_amount+' | status:'+h.status\)}}console.log\('done'\)}\)\(\)")
